channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - wccftech.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for wccftech.com

item.title: Major Spoilers for 007 First Light and Other Upcoming Games Leaked Thanks to Breach in Indonesia’s Games Ratings Board
item.content:encoded:
IO Interactive's upcoming James Bond action-adventure, 007 First Light, is weeks away from its arrival on PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X/S (its Nintendo Switch 2 version was delayed). But you can already go see how the game ends if you want to find it, as a new report from VGC reveals that what appears to be the last hour of the game's story, along with significant spoilers for other unreleased games, have leaked online thanks to the Indonesian Games Ratings System (IGRS).

Gameplay footage sent to the IGRS by IO Interactive, so the IGRS could give 007 First Light an appropriate rating, was unfortunately ripe for the picking thanks to a security issue with the IGRS. But that security issue didn't just leave 007 First Light vulnerable. It left several other unreleased titles exposed, including the upcoming Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced and Castlevania: Belmont's Curse.

Though, at least in the case of those games it doesn't seem to be the case that a whack of gameplay footage was leaked, or at least nothing has yet made the rounds online. Echoes of Aincrad is the only other game that, so far, has had some leaked gameplay footage pop up, and just like with 007 First Light, the leaked footage is also of some pretty significant story moments.

So just be on the lookout for anything marked as a 007 First Light leak over the next few weeks, especially if it's claiming to include information on how the game ends, because there's a good chance it is accurate and will definitely spoil your experience if you're looking to play it right at launch when it arrives on May 27, 2026.

For more on 007 First Light ahead of its release, you can check out our interview with IO Interactive, where the developer dug into how the narrative drives the gameplay. You can also check out our round-up page for all of our news coverage and a breakdown of everything you need to know about the game.

About the author: David has been writing about videogames, technology, and culture since 2020, with a focus on reporting daily news across multiple publications, including GameDaily.Biz, GameSkinny, and PlayStation Universe before joining Wccftech in 2025. David started contributing as Canada/US reporter for Wccftech's gaming section in 2025. Besides being up-to-date on the industry's movements, he loves interviewing developers, reviewing games, and writing intricate essays about the symbolism and layered meanings to be found in rich narratives as he's done for publications like GamesIndustry.Biz, LostInCult, and others. Outside of games he loves movies, music, theatre, his hometown, and his family, though not necessarily in that order.

Follow Wccftech on Google to get more of our news coverage in your feeds.



https://wccftech.com/007-first-light-ending-leak-major-spoilers-indonesian-games-rating-board/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
